dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal describes a breakaway pattern where price breaks both the previous day's range (prev_high/prev_low) AND pivot levels (pivot, r1, s1). Entry triggered when close breaks above r1 AND prev_high (upside) or below s1 AND prev_low (downside). Exit when price reverts toward the pivot level, indicating exhaustion of the magnified move. Context-dependent direction reflects the bidirectional nature of the pattern.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal describes a breakaway pattern where price breaks both the previous day's range (prev_high/prev_low) AND pivot levels (pivot, r1, s1). Entry triggered when close breaks above r1 AND prev_high (upside) or below s1 AND prev_low (downside). Exit when price reverts toward the pivot level, indicating exhaustion of the magnified move. Context-dependent direction reflects the bidirectional nature of the pattern.

source_rule_text: When price breaks away from both the previous day's range and the pivot level, expect a more dramatic and magnified move in the direction of the break.
